schema.description: Describes the request body of the /bulkindexshortcuts API call

allOf.description: Describes the request body of a bulk upload API call

uploadId.description: Unique id that must be used for this bulk upload instance

isFirstPage.description: true if this is the first page of the upload. Defaults to false

isLastPage.description: true if this is the last page of the upload. Defaults to false

forceRestartUpload.description: Flag to discard previous upload attempts and start from scratch. Must be specified with isFirstPage=true

allOf.title: BulkIndexRequest

inputAlias.description: link text following the viewPrefix as entered by the user. For example, if the view prefix is `go/` and the shortened URL is `go/abc`, then `abc` is the inputAlias.

description.description: A short, plain text blurb to help people understand the intent of the shortcut.

createdBy.description: Email of the user who created this shortcut.

createTime.description: The time the shortcut was created in epoch seconds.

updatedBy.description: Email of the user who last updated this shortcut.

updateTime.description: The time the shortcut was updated in epoch seconds.

intermediateUrl.description: The URL from which the user is then redirected to the destination URL.

editUrl.description: The URL using which the user can access the edit page of the shortcut.

schema.title: BulkIndexShortcutsRequest
